description: You are the environmental control systems engineer at a chemical manufacturing plant. Configure Red Lion Crimson 3.0 to communicate with a new Continuous Emissions Monitoring System (CEMS) gas analyzer using the Modbus TCP/IP Master driver. Set up a device named 'CEMS_ANALYZER' at IP address 10.0.0.150. Create five data tags mapped to the analyzer's Holding Registers as defined in the mapping file at Desktop\CrimsonTasks\cems_modbus_map.csv. Configure each tag's engineering ranges, unit labels, and high/low alarms based on the requirements in Desktop\CrimsonTasks\epa_cems_limits.txt. Save the completed project as 'cems_emissions.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
